package.name: g1_sim_bridge
package.description: Isaac Sim -> FAST-LIO bridge (simulation only). Converts the Isaac Sim MID-360 output (/livox/lidar PointCloud2 + /livox/imu_raw Imu) into the livox_ros_driver2/CustomMsg on /livox/custom_msg and a RELIABLE /livox/imu, exactly as FAST_LIO_LOCALIZATION_HUMANOID (lidar_type:1) expects. Not used on the real robot, where the Livox SDK driver emits CustomMsg + /livox/imu natively.
